title: Crispy Carrot Dumplings
subtitle: with Hazelnut Sesame Butter & Apple Arugula Salad

steps.text: Bring a medium saucepan of salted water to a boil for the carrots. Peel carrots and thinly slice into rounds. Finely chop the hazelnuts. Finely chop the parsley leaves. Thinly slice the apple. Add sliced apple, Champagne vinegar, and a pinch of salt to a medium bowl and toss.

Once the water is boiling, add sliced carrots and cook until fork-tender, 6 to 7 minutes. Drain boiled carrots and transfer to a food processor. Add just half the chopped parsley, cream cheese, pumpkin pie spice, and ½ tsp salt to the food processor and blend until smooth, scraping down the sides as necessary.

Place dumpling wrappers on a flat surface and fill a small bowl with cold water. Use a tablespoon to place carrot filling in the center of each wrapper. Dip your finger in the cold water and wet the rim of each wrapper. Fold dumpling wrappers over the filling and press down to seal, pinching tightly.

Melt butter in a large nonstick skillet over medium heat. Add chopped hazelnuts, white sesame seeds, and a pinch of salt. Cook, tossing frequently, until fragrant, 2 to 3 minutes. Use a slotted spoon to transfer toasted nuts and sesame seeds to a bowl, reserving the butter in the skillet.

Increase the heat to medium-high. Add half the carrot dumplings to the skillet and cook until browned and crispy, 2 to 3 minutes. Flip dumplings and cook for 1 minute. Add ¼ cup water, reduce heat to medium, and cover. Steam crispy carrot dumplings until tender and the water has evaporated, 3 to 4 minutes. Repeat with remaining dumplings.

Add baby arugula, 1 tsp olive oil, and a pinch of pepper to the bowl with the apples. Toss the apple arugula salad to coat evenly. Divide the crispy carrot dumplings between plates and sprinkle with toasted hazelnuts and sesame seeds and remaining chopped parsley. Serve the apple arugula salad on the side. Dig in!

tips: * This ingredient will be split between steps.
TIP: The nuts and seeds can burn quickly, so reduce heat if necessary.
